start.text: You awaken in a mystical forest, surrounded by towering trees with glowing leaves. A sense of adventure fills the air as you hear distant whispers.

battle.message: A goblin scout leaps from behind a bush, brandishing a crude dagger!

npc.name: Wise Sage
npc.dialogue: Greetings, young adventurer. The forest is restless, and dark forces are at work. Seek the Ancient Scroll in the haunted castle to the north.

start.event: A magical butterfly lands on your shoulder, granting you a temporary boost in agility.

node1.text: You arrive at the edge of a haunted castle. Its spires loom ominously against the twilight sky.

battle.message: An undead warrior emerges from the shadows, its rusty blade thirsting for your blood!

node1.event: You trigger a hidden trap, narrowly avoiding a pit of spikes.

node2.text: Deep within the castle, you find a room filled with ancient artifacts and dusty tomes.

npc.name: Mysterious Stranger
npc.dialogue: The Ancient Scroll you seek is guarded by the Dark Sorcerer in his tower. But beware, for he is merely a pawn of the true evil that lurks beneath the mountains.

node2.event: You solve a magical puzzle, revealing a hidden passage.

node3.text: You emerge from the castle into a bustling city, its streets alive with merchants and travelers.

npc.name: Merchant
npc.dialogue: Ah, a brave adventurer! I have just the thing you need for your journey to the icy mountains. This enchanted cloak will protect you from the biting cold.

node3.event: You overhear rumors of a dragon terrorizing villages in the north.

node4.text: The icy winds howl as you ascend the treacherous mountain path. Snow-capped peaks surround you.

battle.message: A massive frost troll blocks your path, its icy breath freezing the air around you!

node4.event: An avalanche forces you to seek shelter in a nearby cave.

node5.text: The cave opens into a vast network of dark caverns. Strange echoes and eerie lights dance in the distance.

battle.message: A terrifying Shadow Beast materializes from the darkness, its red eyes fixed upon you!

npc.name: Village Elder
npc.dialogue: You've come far, hero. The Dragon King awaits in his lair beyond these caverns. Use the Ancient Scroll to unveil his true weakness.

node5.event: A magical crystal illuminates the path ahead, revealing ancient dwarven runes.

node6.text: You enter a massive chamber filled with mountains of gold and jewels. At its center, the Dragon King awaits.

battle.message: The Dragon King roars, shaking the very foundations of the mountain. The final battle begins!

node6.event: You use the Ancient Scroll, revealing the Dragon King's hidden vulnerability.

end.text: With a mighty blow, you vanquish the Dragon King. As his reign of terror ends, peace returns to the land. Your name will be sung in ballads for generations to come.
end.event: You are hailed as the realm's greatest hero, and the grateful citizens build a statue in your honor.
